title: bidens tripartita f. orthodoxa
intro: Bidens tripartita f. orthodoxa, also known as three-lobe biddens or three-lobed beggarticks, is a subspecies of Bidens tripartita, a flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Bidens tripartita f. orthodoxa include reducing pain, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Bidens tripartita f. orthodoxa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
